svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(251, 251, 250), rgb(21, 21, 20)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(47, 111, 114), rgb(110, 165, 168));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 884px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 16px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1a1c1e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a1c1e, #d4d6d8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(47, 111, 114), rgb(110, 165, 168));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 268px; height: 1px; padding-top: 90px; margin-left: 21px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1a1c1e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a1c1e, #d4d6d8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
